description: Style Note Talk about style and comfort, and there's nothing to beat this t-shirt from spykar. The graphic print adds unparalleled cool to this tee. Team this T-shirt with jeans and sports shoes and hit the road in style. Product Details White printed t-shirt  has a u-neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Material and Care 95% cotton and 5% spandex only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Do not soak or wring Dry flat in shade and set shape when wet Moderate warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 32") is wearing a size M
